properties.description: Detecta miembro eliminado de un grupo sensible definido en watchlist.
properties.query:
let watchlist_PR_CLD_031_032_Group = (_GetWatchlist("watchlist_PR_CLD_031_032_Group") | project SearchKey);
AuditLogs
| where OperationName == "Remove member from group"
| extend GroupName = tostring((TargetResources[0].modifiedProperties)[1].oldValue)
| where GroupName in~ (watchlist_PR_CLD_031_032_Group) // Grupos sensibles, modificar whatchlist
| extend RemovedUser = tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName)
| extend RemovedUserId = tostring((TargetResources[0].modifiedProperties)[0].oldValue)
| extend ActorUsername = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
| where isnotempty(ActorUsername)
| project TimeGenerated, TargetUsername = RemovedUser, TargetUserScopeId = RemovedUserId, GroupName, ActorUsername
properties.displayName: [TEST] PR-CLD-031-T1078.004 Miembro eliminado de grupo sensible
